from odoo import models, fields, api


class ProjectProject(models.Model):
    _inherit = 'project.project'

    dashboard_internal_co_total = fields.Monetary(
        string="Internal Change Orders",
        compute="_compute_dashboard_metrics",
        currency_field="currency_id",
        store=True,
        help="Sum of all internal change order amounts"
    )

    dashboard_external_co_total = fields.Monetary(
        string="External Change Orders",
        compute="_compute_dashboard_metrics",
        currency_field="currency_id",
        store=True,
        help="Sum of all external change order amounts"
    )

    dashboard_total_co = fields.Monetary(
        string="Total Change Orders",
        compute="_compute_dashboard_metrics",
        currency_field="currency_id",
        store=True,
        help="Sum of all change orders (internal + external)"
    )

    dashboard_po_total = fields.Monetary(
        string="Purchase Orders Total",
        compute="_compute_dashboard_metrics",
        currency_field="currency_id",
        store=True,
        help="Sum of all purchase order amounts linked to this project"
    )

    dashboard_timesheet_hours = fields.Float(
        string="Total Timesheet Hours",
        compute="_compute_dashboard_metrics",
        store=True,
        help="Sum of all timesheet hours logged on this project"
    )

    dashboard_daily_reports_count = fields.Integer(
        string="Daily Reports Count",
        compute="_compute_dashboard_metrics",
        store=True,
        help="Number of daily reports submitted for this project"
    )

    dashboard_daily_report_hours = fields.Float(
        string="Daily Report Hours",
        compute="_compute_dashboard_metrics",
        store=True,
        help="Sum of hours from daily reports"
    )

    dashboard_total_spent_hours = fields.Float(
        string="Total Spent Hours",
        compute="_compute_dashboard_metrics",
        store=True,
        help="Sum of timesheet hours and daily report hours"
    )

    dashboard_hours_balance = fields.Float(
        string="Hours Balance",
        compute="_compute_dashboard_hours_balance",
        store=True,
        help="Allocated hours (from project) - Total spent hours"
    )

    dashboard_project_balance = fields.Monetary(
        string="Project Balance",
        compute="_compute_dashboard_balance",
        currency_field="currency_id",
        store=True,
        help="Overall project balance calculation"
    )

    @api.depends(
        'change_order_ids.dollar_amount',
        'change_order_ids.external_internal',
        'timesheet_ids.unit_amount',
        'daily_ids.hours_spent'
    )
    def _compute_dashboard_metrics(self):
        for project in self:
            internal_total = 0.0
            external_total = 0.0

            for co in project.change_order_ids:
                if co.external_internal == 'internal':
                    internal_total += co.dollar_amount
                elif co.external_internal == 'external':
                    external_total += co.dollar_amount

            project.dashboard_internal_co_total = internal_total
            project.dashboard_external_co_total = external_total
            project.dashboard_total_co = internal_total + external_total

            timesheet_hours = 0.0
            if hasattr(project, 'timesheet_ids'):
                timesheet_hours = sum(project.timesheet_ids.mapped('unit_amount'))

            project.dashboard_timesheet_hours = timesheet_hours

            daily_count = 0
            daily_hours = 0.0
            if hasattr(project, 'daily_ids'):
                daily_count = len(project.daily_ids)
                daily_hours = sum(project.daily_ids.mapped('hours_spent'))

            project.dashboard_daily_reports_count = daily_count
            project.dashboard_daily_report_hours = daily_hours
            project.dashboard_total_spent_hours = timesheet_hours + daily_hours

            po_total = 0.0
            if project.account_id:
                analytic_lines = self.env['account.analytic.line'].search([
                    ('account_id', '=', project.account_id.id),
                    ('category', '=', 'vendor_bill')
                ])
                po_total = sum(analytic_lines.mapped('amount'))

            project.dashboard_po_total = abs(po_total)

    @api.depends(
        'x_bom_summary_modified_total',
        'dashboard_total_co',
        'dashboard_po_total'
    )
    def _compute_dashboard_balance(self):
        for project in self:
            bom_total = project.x_bom_summary_modified_total or 0.0
            co_total = project.dashboard_total_co or 0.0
            po_total = project.dashboard_po_total or 0.0

            project.dashboard_project_balance = bom_total + co_total - po_total

    @api.depends('allocated_hours', 'dashboard_total_spent_hours')
    def _compute_dashboard_hours_balance(self):
        for project in self:
            allocated = project.allocated_hours or 0.0
            spent = project.dashboard_total_spent_hours or 0.0
            project.dashboard_hours_balance = allocated - spent

from odoo import models, fields, api


class ProjectKpiDashboard(models.Model):
    _name = 'project.kpi.dashboard'
    _description = 'Project KPI Dashboard'

    name = fields.Char(string="Period Name", compute="_compute_name", store=True)
    date_from = fields.Date(string="Date From", required=True)
    date_to = fields.Date(string="Date To", required=True)

    project_count = fields.Integer(
        string="Projects Count",
        compute="_compute_kpi_metrics",
        store=True,
        help="Number of projects in the period"
    )

    avg_bom_total = fields.Monetary(
        string="Average BOM Total",
        compute="_compute_kpi_metrics",
        currency_field="currency_id",
        store=True,
        help="Average BOM total for projects"
    )

    max_bom_total = fields.Monetary(
        string="Maximum BOM Total",
        compute="_compute_kpi_metrics",
        currency_field="currency_id",
        store=True,
        help="Maximum BOM total for projects"
    )

    min_bom_total = fields.Monetary(
        string="Minimum BOM Total",
        compute="_compute_kpi_metrics",
        currency_field="currency_id",
        store=True,
        help="Minimum BOM total for projects"
    )

    total_bom_amount = fields.Monetary(
        string="Total BOM Amount",
        compute="_compute_kpi_metrics",
        currency_field="currency_id",
        store=True,
        help="Sum of all BOM totals in the period"
    )

    total_expected_revenue = fields.Monetary(
        string="Total Expected Revenue",
        compute="_compute_kpi_metrics",
        currency_field="currency_id",
        store=True,
        help="Sum of Award Amount on projects in the period (aligned with CRM expected revenue when ported)."
    )

    avg_expected_revenue = fields.Monetary(
        string="Average Expected Revenue",
        compute="_compute_kpi_metrics",
        currency_field="currency_id",
        store=True,
        help="Average Award Amount per project in the period."
    )

    avg_change_orders = fields.Monetary(
        string="Average Change Orders",
        compute="_compute_kpi_metrics",
        currency_field="currency_id",
        store=True,
        help="Average total change orders"
    )

    max_change_orders = fields.Monetary(
        string="Maximum Change Orders",
        compute="_compute_kpi_metrics",
        currency_field="currency_id",
        store=True,
        help="Maximum total change orders"
    )

    min_change_orders = fields.Monetary(
        string="Minimum Change Orders",
        compute="_compute_kpi_metrics",
        currency_field="currency_id",
        store=True,
        help="Minimum total change orders"
    )

    total_change_orders = fields.Monetary(
        string="Total Change Orders",
        compute="_compute_kpi_metrics",
        currency_field="currency_id",
        store=True,
        help="Sum of all change orders in the period"
    )

    avg_po_total = fields.Monetary(
        string="Average PO Total",
        compute="_compute_kpi_metrics",
        currency_field="currency_id",
        store=True,
        help="Average purchase order total"
    )

    max_po_total = fields.Monetary(
        string="Maximum PO Total",
        compute="_compute_kpi_metrics",
        currency_field="currency_id",
        store=True,
        help="Maximum purchase order total"
    )

    min_po_total = fields.Monetary(
        string="Minimum PO Total",
        compute="_compute_kpi_metrics",
        currency_field="currency_id",
        store=True,
        help="Minimum purchase order total"
    )

    total_po_amount = fields.Monetary(
        string="Total PO Amount",
        compute="_compute_kpi_metrics",
        currency_field="currency_id",
        store=True,
        help="Sum of all purchase orders in the period"
    )

    avg_project_balance = fields.Monetary(
        string="Average Project Balance",
        compute="_compute_kpi_metrics",
        currency_field="currency_id",
        store=True,
        help="Average project balance"
    )

    max_project_balance = fields.Monetary(
        string="Maximum Project Balance",
        compute="_compute_kpi_metrics",
        currency_field="currency_id",
        store=True,
        help="Maximum project balance"
    )

    min_project_balance = fields.Monetary(
        string="Minimum Project Balance",
        compute="_compute_kpi_metrics",
        currency_field="currency_id",
        store=True,
        help="Minimum project balance"
    )

    total_project_balance = fields.Monetary(
        string="Total Project Balance",
        compute="_compute_kpi_metrics",
        currency_field="currency_id",
        store=True,
        help="Sum of all project balances"
    )

    avg_allocated_hours = fields.Float(
        string="Average Allocated Hours",
        compute="_compute_kpi_metrics",
        store=True,
        help="Average allocated hours per project"
    )

    avg_spent_hours = fields.Float(
        string="Average Spent Hours",
        compute="_compute_kpi_metrics",
        store=True,
        help="Average spent hours per project"
    )

    avg_hours_balance = fields.Float(
        string="Average Hours Balance",
        compute="_compute_kpi_metrics",
        store=True,
        help="Average hours balance per project"
    )

    total_allocated_hours = fields.Float(
        string="Total Allocated Hours",
        compute="_compute_kpi_metrics",
        store=True,
        help="Sum of all allocated hours"
    )

    total_spent_hours = fields.Float(
        string="Total Spent Hours",
        compute="_compute_kpi_metrics",
        store=True,
        help="Sum of all spent hours"
    )

    total_hours_balance = fields.Float(
        string="Total Hours Balance",
        compute="_compute_kpi_metrics",
        store=True,
        help="Sum of all hours balances"
    )

    projects_over_budget_count = fields.Integer(
        string="Projects Over Budget",
        compute="_compute_kpi_metrics",
        store=True,
        help="Number of projects with negative balance"
    )

    projects_under_budget_count = fields.Integer(
        string="Projects Under Budget",
        compute="_compute_kpi_metrics",
        store=True,
        help="Number of projects with positive balance"
    )

    over_budget_percentage = fields.Float(
        string="Over Budget %",
        compute="_compute_kpi_metrics",
        store=True,
        help="Percentage of projects over budget"
    )

    currency_id = fields.Many2one(
        'res.currency',
        string="Currency",
        default=lambda self: self.env.company.currency_id,
        required=True
    )

    project_ids = fields.Many2many(
        'project.project',
        string="Related Projects",
        compute="_compute_project_ids",
        help="Projects started in this period"
    )

    @api.depends('date_from', 'date_to')
    def _compute_name(self):
        for record in self:
            if record.date_from and record.date_to:
                record.name = f"{record.date_from.strftime('%Y-%m-%d')} to {record.date_to.strftime('%Y-%m-%d')}"
            else:
                record.name = "New Period"

    @api.depends('date_from', 'date_to')
    def _compute_project_ids(self):
        for record in self:
            if record.date_from and record.date_to:
                projects = self.env['project.project'].search([
                    ('date_start', '>=', record.date_from),
                    ('date_start', '<=', record.date_to),
                    ('active', '=', True)
                ])
                record.project_ids = projects
            else:
                record.project_ids = False

    @api.depends('date_from', 'date_to', 'project_ids')
    def _compute_kpi_metrics(self):
        for record in self:
            if not record.date_from or not record.date_to:
                record._reset_metrics()
                continue

            projects = record.project_ids

            record.project_count = len(projects)

            if not projects:
                record._reset_metrics()
                continue

            bom_totals = [p.x_bom_summary_modified_total for p in projects if p.x_bom_summary_modified_total]
            co_totals = [p.dashboard_total_co for p in projects if p.dashboard_total_co]
            po_totals = [p.dashboard_po_total for p in projects if p.dashboard_po_total]
            balances = [p.dashboard_project_balance for p in projects]
            allocated_hours = [p.allocated_hours for p in projects if p.allocated_hours]
            spent_hours = [p.dashboard_total_spent_hours for p in projects if p.dashboard_total_spent_hours]
            hours_balance = [p.dashboard_hours_balance for p in projects]

            if bom_totals:
                record.avg_bom_total = sum(bom_totals) / len(bom_totals)
                record.max_bom_total = max(bom_totals)
                record.min_bom_total = min(bom_totals)
                record.total_bom_amount = sum(bom_totals)
            else:
                record.avg_bom_total = 0.0
                record.max_bom_total = 0.0
                record.min_bom_total = 0.0
                record.total_bom_amount = 0.0

            awards = [(p.award_amount or 0.0) for p in projects]
            record.total_expected_revenue = sum(awards)
            record.avg_expected_revenue = (
                record.total_expected_revenue / len(projects) if projects else 0.0
            )

            if co_totals:
                record.avg_change_orders = sum(co_totals) / len(co_totals)
                record.max_change_orders = max(co_totals)
                record.min_change_orders = min(co_totals)
                record.total_change_orders = sum(co_totals)
            else:
                record.avg_change_orders = 0.0
                record.max_change_orders = 0.0
                record.min_change_orders = 0.0
                record.total_change_orders = 0.0

            if po_totals:
                record.avg_po_total = sum(po_totals) / len(po_totals)
                record.max_po_total = max(po_totals)
                record.min_po_total = min(po_totals)
                record.total_po_amount = sum(po_totals)
            else:
                record.avg_po_total = 0.0
                record.max_po_total = 0.0
                record.min_po_total = 0.0
                record.total_po_amount = 0.0

            if balances:
                record.avg_project_balance = sum(balances) / len(balances)
                record.max_project_balance = max(balances)
                record.min_project_balance = min(balances)
                record.total_project_balance = sum(balances)
                record.projects_over_budget_count = len([b for b in balances if b < 0])
                record.projects_under_budget_count = len([b for b in balances if b >= 0])
                if len(balances) > 0:
                    record.over_budget_percentage = (record.projects_over_budget_count / len(balances)) 
                else:
                    record.over_budget_percentage = 0.0
            else:
                record.avg_project_balance = 0.0
                record.max_project_balance = 0.0
                record.min_project_balance = 0.0
                record.total_project_balance = 0.0
                record.projects_over_budget_count = 0
                record.projects_under_budget_count = 0
                record.over_budget_percentage = 0.0

            if allocated_hours:
                record.avg_allocated_hours = sum(allocated_hours) / len(allocated_hours)
                record.total_allocated_hours = sum(allocated_hours)
            else:
                record.avg_allocated_hours = 0.0
                record.total_allocated_hours = 0.0

            if spent_hours:
                record.avg_spent_hours = sum(spent_hours) / len(spent_hours)
                record.total_spent_hours = sum(spent_hours)
            else:
                record.avg_spent_hours = 0.0
                record.total_spent_hours = 0.0

            if hours_balance:
                record.avg_hours_balance = sum(hours_balance) / len(hours_balance)
                record.total_hours_balance = sum(hours_balance)
            else:
                record.avg_hours_balance = 0.0
                record.total_hours_balance = 0.0

    def _reset_metrics(self):
        self.project_count = 0
        self.avg_bom_total = 0.0
        self.max_bom_total = 0.0
        self.min_bom_total = 0.0
        self.total_bom_amount = 0.0
        self.total_expected_revenue = 0.0
        self.avg_expected_revenue = 0.0
        self.avg_change_orders = 0.0
        self.max_change_orders = 0.0
        self.min_change_orders = 0.0
        self.total_change_orders = 0.0
        self.avg_po_total = 0.0
        self.max_po_total = 0.0
        self.min_po_total = 0.0
        self.total_po_amount = 0.0
        self.avg_project_balance = 0.0
        self.max_project_balance = 0.0
        self.min_project_balance = 0.0
        self.total_project_balance = 0.0
        self.avg_allocated_hours = 0.0
        self.avg_spent_hours = 0.0
        self.avg_hours_balance = 0.0
        self.total_allocated_hours = 0.0
        self.total_spent_hours = 0.0
        self.total_hours_balance = 0.0
        self.projects_over_budget_count = 0
        self.projects_under_budget_count = 0
        self.over_budget_percentage = 0.0

    def action_view_projects(self):
        self.ensure_one()
        return {
            'type': 'ir.actions.act_window',
            'name': f'Projects - {self.name}',
            'res_model': 'project.project',
            'view_mode': 'list,form',
            'domain': [('id', 'in', self.project_ids.ids)],
            'context': {'create': False}
        }

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<odoo>
    <record id="view_project_dashboard_list" model="ir.ui.view">
        <field name="name">project.project.dashboard.list</field>
        <field name="model">project.project</field>
        <field name="inherit_id" ref="project.view_project"/>
        <field name="arch" type="xml">
            <xpath expr="//list" position="attributes">
                <attribute name="decoration-success">dashboard_project_balance > 0</attribute>
                <attribute name="decoration-danger">dashboard_project_balance < 0</attribute>
            </xpath>
            <xpath expr="//field[@name='name']" position="replace">
                <field name="name" optional="show"/>
                <field name="main_category_id" optional="show"/>
                <field name="date_start" string="Start Date" optional="show"/>
                <field name="date" string="End Date" optional="show"/>
                <field name="location" optional="show"/>
                <field name="type_of_award" optional="show"/>
                <field name="contract_po" optional="show"/>
                <field name="x_bom_summary_total_adjustment"
                        string="BOM Est. Budget"
                        widget="monetary"
                        options="{'currency_field': 'company_currency'}"
                        optional="show"/>
                <field name="x_bom_summary_total_current_expense"
                        string="BOM Current"
                        widget="monetary"
                        options="{'currency_field': 'company_currency'}"
                        optional="show"/>
                <field name="x_bom_summary_balance_grand"
                        string="BOM Balance"
                        widget="monetary"
                        options="{'currency_field': 'company_currency'}"
                        optional="show"/>
                <field name="deliverable_summary" string="Deliverables" optional="show"/>
                <field name="certified_payroll" optional="show"/>
                <field name="allocated_hours" widget="float_time" optional="show"/>
                <field name="dashboard_total_spent_hours" widget="float_time" optional="show"/>
                <field name="dashboard_hours_balance" widget="float_time" optional="show"/>
                <field name="dashboard_internal_co_total"
                       widget="monetary"
                       optional="show"/>
                <field name="dashboard_external_co_total"
                       widget="monetary"
                       optional="show"/>
            </xpath>
        </field>
    </record>

    <record id="view_project_dashboard_form" model="ir.ui.view">
        <field name="name">project.project.dashboard.form</field>
        <field name="model">project.project</field>
        <field name="inherit_id" ref="project.edit_project"/>
        <field name="arch" type="xml">
            <xpath expr="//notebook" position="inside">
                <page string="Financial Dashboard" name="financial_dashboard">
                    <group>
                        <group string="Revenue">
                            <field name="x_bom_summary_modified_total"/>
                            <field name="dashboard_total_co"/>
                            <field name="dashboard_internal_co_total"/>
                            <field name="dashboard_external_co_total"/>
                        </group>
                        <group string="Costs">
                            <field name="dashboard_po_total"/>
                        </group>
                    </group>
                    <group>
                        <group string="Project Activity">
                            <field name="dashboard_timesheet_hours" widget="float_time"/>
                            <field name="dashboard_daily_reports_count"/>
                            <field name="dashboard_daily_report_hours" widget="float_time"/>
                            <field name="dashboard_total_spent_hours" widget="float_time"/>
                        </group>
                        <group string="Balance">
                            <field name="allocated_hours" widget="float_time"/>
                            <field name="dashboard_hours_balance" widget="float_time"/>
                            <separator/>
                            <field name="dashboard_project_balance"
                                   widget="monetary"
                                   class="oe_subtotal_footer_separator"/>
                        </group>
                    </group>
                </page>
            </xpath>
        </field>
    </record>
</odoo>

1. In `project_project.py`, there's a `dashboard_project_balance` field computed in `_compute_dashboard_balance()` that calculates: 
   - Balance = BOM Total + Change Orders - Purchase Orders

2. To add a profit percentage field, I need to:
   - Add a new computed field `dashboard_profit_percentage` 
   - Calculate it based on the balance vs budget
   - The formula would be: (Balance / Budget) * 100, where Budget = BOM Total + Change Orders
   - Or alternatively: (Balance / (Balance + PO Total)) * 100 to show profit margin
   
Let me clarify with the user what exactly they mean by "profit percentage basis in the balance of budget vs expenses".

Actually, thinking about it more carefully:
- Budget = BOM Total + Change Orders
- Expenses = Purchase Orders
- Balance = Budget - Expenses = BOM + CO - PO
- Profit % = (Balance / Budget) * 100

This makes sense as a percentage of how much of the budget is remaining as profit.

Let me implement this:

1. Add the field in the model
2. Add it to the depends and compute method
3. Update the view to display it

Let me create the changes.

from odoo import models, fields, api


class ProjectProject(models.Model):
    _inherit = 'project.project'

    dashboard_internal_co_total = fields.Monetary(
        string="Internal Change Orders",
        compute="_compute_dashboard_metrics",
        currency_field="currency_id",
        store=True,
        help="Sum of all internal change order amounts"
    )

    dashboard_external_co_total = fields.Monetary(
        string="External Change Orders",
        compute="_compute_dashboard_metrics",
        currency_field="currency_id",
        store=True,
        help="Sum of all external change order amounts"
    )

    dashboard_total_co = fields.Monetary(
        string="Total Change Orders",
        compute="_compute_dashboard_metrics",
        currency_field="currency_id",
        store=True,
        help="Sum of all change orders (internal + external)"
    )

    dashboard_po_total = fields.Monetary(
        string="Purchase Orders Total",
        compute="_compute_dashboard_metrics",
        currency_field="currency_id",
        store=True,
        help="Sum of all purchase order amounts linked to this project"
    )

    dashboard_timesheet_hours = fields.Float(
        string="Total Timesheet Hours",
        compute="_compute_dashboard_metrics",
        store=True,
        help="Sum of all timesheet hours logged on this project"
    )

    dashboard_daily_reports_count = fields.Integer(
        string="Daily Reports Count",
        compute="_compute_dashboard_metrics",
        store=True,
        help="Number of daily reports submitted for this project"
    )

    dashboard_daily_report_hours = fields.Float(
        string="Daily Report Hours",
        compute="_compute_dashboard_metrics",
        store=True,
        help="Sum of hours from daily reports"
    )

    dashboard_total_spent_hours = fields.Float(
        string="Total Spent Hours",
        compute="_compute_dashboard_metrics",
        store=True,
        help="Sum of timesheet hours and daily report hours"
    )

    dashboard_hours_balance = fields.Float(
        string="Hours Balance",
        compute="_compute_dashboard_hours_balance",
        store=True,
        help="Allocated hours (from project) - Total spent hours"
    )

    dashboard_project_balance = fields.Monetary(
        string="Project Balance",
        compute="_compute_dashboard_balance",
        currency_field="currency_id",
        store=True,
        help="Overall project balance calculation"
    )

    @api.depends(
        'change_order_ids.dollar_amount',
        'change_order_ids.external_internal',
        'timesheet_ids.unit_amount',
        'daily_ids.hours_spent'
    )
    def _compute_dashboard_metrics(self):
        for project in self:
            internal_total = 0.0
            external_total = 0.0

            for co in project.change_order_ids:
                if co.external_internal == 'internal':
                    internal_total += co.dollar_amount
                elif co.external_internal == 'external':
                    external_total += co.dollar_amount

            project.dashboard_internal_co_total = internal_total
            project.dashboard_external_co_total = external_total
            project.dashboard_total_co = internal_total + external_total

            timesheet_hours = 0.0
            if hasattr(project, 'timesheet_ids'):
                timesheet_hours = sum(project.timesheet_ids.mapped('unit_amount'))

            project.dashboard_timesheet_hours = timesheet_hours

            daily_count = 0
            daily_hours = 0.0
            if hasattr(project, 'daily_ids'):
                daily_count = len(project.daily_ids)
                daily_hours = sum(project.daily_ids.mapped('hours_spent'))

            project.dashboard_daily_reports_count = daily_count
            project.dashboard_daily_report_hours = daily_hours
            project.dashboard_total_spent_hours = timesheet_hours + daily_hours

            po_total = 0.0
            if project.account_id:
                analytic_lines = self.env['account.analytic.line'].search([
                    ('account_id', '=', project.account_id.id),
                    ('category', '=', 'vendor_bill')
                ])
                po_total = sum(analytic_lines.mapped('amount'))

            project.dashboard_po_total = abs(po_total)

    @api.depends(
        'x_bom_summary_modified_total',
        'dashboard_total_co',
        'dashboard_po_total'
    )
    def _compute_dashboard_balance(self):
        for project in self:
            bom_total = project.x_bom_summary_modified_total or 0.0
            co_total = project.dashboard_total_co or 0.0
            po_total = project.dashboard_po_total or 0.0

            project.dashboard_project_balance = bom_total + co_total - po_total

    @api.depends('allocated_hours', 'dashboard_total_spent_hours')
    def _compute_dashboard_hours_balance(self):
        for project in self:
            allocated = project.allocated_hours or 0.0
            spent = project.dashboard_total_spent_hours or 0.0
            project.dashboard_hours_balance = allocated - spent

lines: +        help="Profit percentage based on balance vs budget: (Balance / Budget) × 100"

from odoo import models, fields, api


class ProjectProject(models.Model):
    _inherit = 'project.project'

    dashboard_internal_co_total = fields.Monetary(
        string="Internal Change Orders",
        compute="_compute_dashboard_metrics",
        currency_field="currency_id",
        store=True,
        help="Sum of all internal change order amounts"
    )

    dashboard_external_co_total = fields.Monetary(
        string="External Change Orders",
        compute="_compute_dashboard_metrics",
        currency_field="currency_id",
        store=True,
        help="Sum of all external change order amounts"
    )

    dashboard_total_co = fields.Monetary(
        string="Total Change Orders",
        compute="_compute_dashboard_metrics",
        currency_field="currency_id",
        store=True,
        help="Sum of all change orders (internal + external)"
    )

    dashboard_po_total = fields.Monetary(
        string="Purchase Orders Total",
        compute="_compute_dashboard_metrics",
        currency_field="currency_id",
        store=True,
        help="Sum of all purchase order amounts linked to this project"
    )

    dashboard_timesheet_hours = fields.Float(
        string="Total Timesheet Hours",
        compute="_compute_dashboard_metrics",
        store=True,
        help="Sum of all timesheet hours logged on this project"
    )

    dashboard_daily_reports_count = fields.Integer(
        string="Daily Reports Count",
        compute="_compute_dashboard_metrics",
        store=True,
        help="Number of daily reports submitted for this project"
    )

    dashboard_daily_report_hours = fields.Float(
        string="Daily Report Hours",
        compute="_compute_dashboard_metrics",
        store=True,
        help="Sum of hours from daily reports"
    )

    dashboard_total_spent_hours = fields.Float(
        string="Total Spent Hours",
        compute="_compute_dashboard_metrics",
        store=True,
        help="Sum of timesheet hours and daily report hours"
    )

    dashboard_hours_balance = fields.Float(
        string="Hours Balance",
        compute="_compute_dashboard_hours_balance",
        store=True,
        help="Allocated hours (from project) - Total spent hours"
    )

    dashboard_project_balance = fields.Monetary(
        string="Project Balance",
        compute="_compute_dashboard_balance",
        currency_field="currency_id",
        store=True,
        help="Overall project balance calculation"
    )

    dashboard_profit_percentage = fields.Float(
        string="Profit %",
        compute="_compute_dashboard_balance",
        store=True,
        help="Profit percentage based on balance vs budget: (Balance / Budget) × 100"
    )

    @api.depends(
        'change_order_ids.dollar_amount',
        'change_order_ids.external_internal',
        'timesheet_ids.unit_amount',
        'daily_ids.hours_spent'
    )
    def _compute_dashboard_metrics(self):
        for project in self:
            internal_total = 0.0
            external_total = 0.0

            for co in project.change_order_ids:
                if co.external_internal == 'internal':
                    internal_total += co.dollar_amount
                elif co.external_internal == 'external':
                    external_total += co.dollar_amount

            project.dashboard_internal_co_total = internal_total
            project.dashboard_external_co_total = external_total
            project.dashboard_total_co = internal_total + external_total

            timesheet_hours = 0.0
            if hasattr(project, 'timesheet_ids'):
                timesheet_hours = sum(project.timesheet_ids.mapped('unit_amount'))

            project.dashboard_timesheet_hours = timesheet_hours

            daily_count = 0
            daily_hours = 0.0
            if hasattr(project, 'daily_ids'):
                daily_count = len(project.daily_ids)
                daily_hours = sum(project.daily_ids.mapped('hours_spent'))

            project.dashboard_daily_reports_count = daily_count
            project.dashboard_daily_report_hours = daily_hours
            project.dashboard_total_spent_hours = timesheet_hours + daily_hours

            po_total = 0.0
            if project.account_id:
                analytic_lines = self.env['account.analytic.line'].search([
                    ('account_id', '=', project.account_id.id),
                    ('category', '=', 'vendor_bill')
                ])
                po_total = sum(analytic_lines.mapped('amount'))

            project.dashboard_po_total = abs(po_total)

    @api.depends(
        'x_bom_summary_modified_total',
        'dashboard_total_co',
        'dashboard_po_total'
    )
    def _compute_dashboard_balance(self):
        for project in self:
            bom_total = project.x_bom_summary_modified_total or 0.0
            co_total = project.dashboard_total_co or 0.0
            po_total = project.dashboard_po_total or 0.0

            project.dashboard_project_balance = bom_total + co_total - po_total

    @api.depends('allocated_hours', 'dashboard_total_spent_hours')
    def _compute_dashboard_hours_balance(self):
        for project in self:
            allocated = project.allocated_hours or 0.0
            spent = project.dashboard_total_spent_hours or 0.0
            project.dashboard_hours_balance = allocated - spent

                <field name="x_bom_summary_total_current_expense"
                        string="BOM Current"
                        widget="monetary"
                        options="{'currency_field': 'company_currency'}"
                        optional="show"/>

                        string="BOM Balance"
                        widget="monetary"
                        options="{'currency_field': 'company_currency'}"

                <field name="dashboard_internal_co_total"
                       widget="monetary"

                <field name="dashboard_external_co_total"
                       widget="monetary"
                       optional="show"/>
                <field name="dashboard_project_balance"
                       string="Balance"
                       widget="monetary"
                       optional="show"/>
                <field name="dashboard_profit_percentage"
                       string="Profit %"
                       widget="percentage"
                       optional="show"/>
            </xpath>
        </field>
    </record>

    <record id="view_project_dashboard_form" model="ir.ui.view">
        <field name="name">project.project.dashboard.form</field>
        <field name="model">project.project</field>
        <field name="inherit_id" ref="project.edit_project"/>
        <field name="arch" type="xml">
            <xpath expr="//notebook" position="inside">

                    <group>
                        <group string="Revenue">
                            <field name="x_bom_summary_modified_total"/>
                            <field name="dashboard_total_co"/>
                            <field name="dashboard_internal_co_total"/>
                            <field name="dashboard_external_co_total"/>
                        </group>
                        <group string="Costs">
                            <field name="dashboard_po_total"/>
                        </group>
                    </group>
                    <group>
                        <group string="Project Activity">
                            <field name="dashboard_timesheet_hours" widget="float_time"/>
                            <field name="dashboard_daily_reports_count"/>
                            <field name="dashboard_daily_report_hours" widget="float_time"/>
                            <field name="dashboard_total_spent_hours" widget="float_time"/>
                        </group>
                        <group string="Balance">
                            <field name="allocated_hours" widget="float_time"/>
                            <field name="dashboard_hours_balance" widget="float_time"/>
                            <separator/>
                            <field name="dashboard_project_balance"
                                   widget="monetary"
                                   class="oe_subtotal_footer_separator"/>
                            <field name="dashboard_profit_percentage"
                                   widget="percentage"
                                   class="oe_subtotal_footer_separator"/>

                    </group>
                </page>
            </xpath>
        </field>
    </record>
</odoo>

content.thinking: Perfect! All the changes look good. Let me create a summary for the user explaining what was added and how to use it.

content.text:
Perfect! I've successfully added a profit percentage field to your project_dashboard module. Here's what was implemented:

## Changes Made

### 1. **Model Changes** (project_project.py:82-87)
Added a new computed field `dashboard_profit_percentage` that calculates:
```
Profit % = (Balance / Budget) × 100
```

Where:
- **Budget** = BOM Total + Change Orders
- **Balance** = Budget - Purchase Orders (expenses)

The calculation is done in `_compute_dashboard_balance()` (project_project.py:149-154):
- If budget > 0, it calculates the percentage
- If budget = 0, it returns 0% to avoid division errors

### 2. **View Changes**
Added the profit percentage field to both views:

- **List View** (lines 50-53): Shows "Profit %" column with percentage widget
- **Form View** (lines 90-92): Displays in the "Balance" section of the Financial Dashboard tab

## How It Works

**Example:**
- BOM Total: $100,000
- Change Orders: $20,000
- Purchase Orders: $85,000

**Calculation:**
- Budget = $100,000 + $20,000 = $120,000
- Balance = $120,000 - $85,000 = $35,000
- Profit % = ($35,000 / $120,000) × 100 = 29.17%

## Next Steps

To use this new feature:
1. Upgrade the module in Odoo
2. The profit percentage will automatically calculate for all projects
3. View it in the project list or the Financial Dashboard tab

The field will display as a formatted percentage (e.g., "29.17%") and is stored in the database for quick access and reporting.

    77→        readonly=True
    78→    )
    79→
    80→
    81→    @api.depends('base_markup', 'markup_modification')
    82→    def _compute_final_markup(self):
    83→        for line in self:
    84→            line.final_markup = line.base_markup + line.markup_modification
    85→    
    86→
    87→    @api.depends('product_id')
    88→    def _compute_allowed_vendor_ids(self):
    89→        for line in self:
    90→            if line.product_id:
    91→                line.allowed_vendor_ids = line.product_id.seller_ids.mapped('partner_id')
    92→            else:
    93→                line.allowed_vendor_ids = [(5, 0, 0)]
    94→                
    95→
    96→    @api.onchange('product_id')
    97→    def _onchange_product_id_set_vendor(self):
    98→        if self.product_id:
    99→            self._compute_allowed_vendor_ids()
   100→            if self.allowed_vendor_ids:
   101→                self.vendor_id = self.allowed_vendor_ids[0]
   102→            else:
   103→                self.vendor_id = False
   104→        else:
   105→            self.vendor_id = False
   106→
   107→
   108→    @api.depends(
   109→        'product_id',
   110→        'product_id.product_tmpl_id.vendor_breakdown_ids.unit_qty',
   111→        'product_id.product_tmpl_id.vendor_breakdown_ids.cost_for_unity_qty'
   112→    )
   113→    def _compute_avg_cost_per_qty(self):
   114→        for line in self:
   115→            if not line.product_id:
   116→                line.avg_cost_per_qty = 0
   117→                continue
   118→
   119→            breakdowns = line.product_id.product_tmpl_id.vendor_breakdown_ids
   120→            if not breakdowns:
   121→                line.avg_cost_per_qty = 0
   122→                continue
   123→
   124→            per_qty_values = []
   125→            for b in breakdowns:
   126→                if b.unit_qty:
   127→                    per_qty_values.append(b.cost_for_unity_qty)
   128→
   129→            line.avg_cost_per_qty = (
   130→                sum(per_qty_values) / len(per_qty_values)
   131→                if per_qty_values else 0
   132→            )
   133→
   134→
   135→    @api.depends('quantity', 'final_markup', 'avg_cost_per_qty')
   136→    def _compute_final_estimated_price(self):
   137→        for line in self:
   138→            total_cost = line.quantity * line.avg_cost_per_qty
   139→            line.final_estimated_price = total_cost * (1 + line.final_markup / 100)
   140→

   144→class ProjectProject(models.Model):
   145→
   146→    _inherit = 'project.project'
   147→
   148→    x_selected_division_id = fields.Many2one(
   149→        'project.division.bom.item',
   150→        string='Select Division/Installation',
   151→        domain="[('project_id', '=', id)]",
   152→        help='Select an installation to view its specific BOM lines.'
   153→    )
   154→    
   155→    labor_bom_ids = fields.One2many(
   156→        'labor.title.bom.line',
   157→        'project_id',
   158→        string='All Labor Titles'
   159→    )
   160→
   161→    x_filtered_labor_title_ids = fields.One2many(
   162→        'labor.title.bom.line',
   163→        'project_id',
   164→        string='Labor Titles (Filtered)',
   165→        compute='_compute_filtered_labor_title_ids',
   166→        inverse='_inverse_filtered_labor_title_ids',
   167→        readonly=False,
   168→    )
   169→
   170→    total_final_estimated_price = fields.Float(
   171→        string="Total Final Estimated Price",
   172→        compute="_compute_total_final_estimated_price",
   173→        store=True,
   174→        readonly=True
   175→    )
   176→
   177→    @api.depends('item_bom_ids.final_estimated_price')
   178→    def _compute_total_final_estimated_price(self):
   179→        for project in self:
   180→            project.total_final_estimated_price = sum(
   181→                project.item_bom_ids.mapped('final_estimated_price')
   182→            )
   183→
   184→ 
   185→    @api.depends('x_selected_division_id', 'labor_bom_ids.division_bom_id', 'labor_bom_ids.man_hours')
   186→    def _compute_filtered_labor_title_ids(self):
   187→        for project in self:
   188→            if project.x_selected_division_id:
   189→                project.x_filtered_labor_title_ids = project.labor_bom_ids.filtered(
   190→                    lambda line: line.division_bom_id == project.x_selected_division_id
   191→                )
   192→            else:
   193→                project.x_filtered_labor_title_ids = self.env['labor.title.bom.line']
   194→                
   195→    def _inverse_filtered_labor_title_ids(self):
   196→        for project in self:
   197→            if not project.x_selected_division_id:
   198→                continue
   199→            
   200→            existing_lines_to_remove = project.labor_bom_ids.filtered(
   201→                lambda line: line.division_bom_id == project.x_selected_division_id
   202→            )
   203→            
   204→            other_lines_to_keep = project.labor_bom_ids - existing_lines_to_remove
   205→            
   206→            commands = [(6, 0, other_lines_to_keep.ids)]
   207→            
   208→            for line in project.x_filtered_labor_title_ids:
   209→                line.project_id = project.id
   210→                line.division_bom_id = project.x_selected_division_id
   211→                
   212→                values = line.read()[0]
   213→                values.pop('id', None)
   214→                
   215→                for key, val in values.items():
   216→                    if isinstance(val, tuple) and len(val) == 2 and isinstance(val[0], int):
   217→                        values[key] = val[0]
   218→
   219→                if line.id:
   220→                    commands.append((1, line.id, values)) 
   221→                else:
   222→                    commands.append((0, 0, values))
   223→
   224→            project.labor_bom_ids = commands
   225→
   226→
   227→    item_bom_ids = fields.One2many(
   228→        'project.item.bom.line',
   229→        'project_id',
   230→        string='All Item BOM Lines'
   231→    )
   232→    
   233→    x_filtered_item_bom_ids = fields.One2many(
   234→        'project.item.bom.line',
   235→        'project_id',
   236→        string='Item BOM Lines (Filtered)',
   237→        compute='_compute_filtered_item_bom_ids',
   238→        inverse='_inverse_filtered_item_bom_ids',
   239→        readonly=False,
   240→    )
   241→
   242→
   243→    @api.depends('x_selected_division_id', 'item_bom_ids.division_bom_id', 'item_bom_ids')
   244→    def _compute_filtered_item_bom_ids(self):
   245→        for project in self:
   246→            if project.x_selected_division_id:
   247→                project.x_filtered_item_bom_ids = project.item_bom_ids.filtered(
   248→                    lambda line: line.division_bom_id == project.x_selected_division_id
   249→                )
   250→            else:
   251→                project.x_filtered_item_bom_ids = self.env['project.item.bom.line']
   252→    
   253→
   254→    def _inverse_filtered_item_bom_ids(self):
   255→        for project in self:
   256→            if not project.x_selected_division_id:
   257→                LOG.info("Project %s: No division selected, skipping inverse", project.id)
   258→                continue
   259→
   260→            LOG.info(
   261→                "Project %s: Processing inverse for division %s",
   262→                project.id,
   263→                project.x_selected_division_id.id,
   264→            )
   265→            
   266→            existing_lines = project.item_bom_ids.filtered(
   267→                lambda line: line.division_bom_id == project.x_selected_division_id
   268→            )
   269→            
   270→            other_lines = project.item_bom_ids - existing_lines
   271→            
   272→            LOG.info(
   273→                "Project %s: Existing lines for division: %s",
   274→                project.id,
   275→                existing_lines.ids,
   276→            )
   277→            LOG.info(
   278→                "Project %s: Other division lines to keep: %s",
   279→                project.id,
   280→                other_lines.ids,
   281→            )
   282→            LOG.info(
   283→                "Project %s: Filtered lines to process: %s",
   284→                project.id,
   285→                len(project.x_filtered_item_bom_ids),
   286→            )
   287→
   288→            new_records = []
   289→            updated_count = 0
   290→            created_count = 0
   291→            deleted_count = 0
   292→            
   293→            for line in other_lines:
   294→                new_records.append((4, line.id, 0))
   295→            
   296→            for line in project.x_filtered_item_bom_ids:
   297→                values = line.read()[0]
   298→                values.pop('id', None) 
   299→                
   300→                for key, val in values.items():
   301→                    if isinstance(val, tuple) and len(val) == 2 and isinstance(val[0], int):
   302→                        values[key] = val[0]
   303→                    if isinstance(val, list) and all(isinstance(item, tuple) for item in val):
   304→                        values[key] = [(6, 0, [item[0] for item in val])]
   305→
   306→                values.pop('category_id', None)
   307→                values.pop('base_markup', None)
   308→                values.pop('final_markup', None)
   309→                values.pop('allowed_vendor_ids', None)
   310→                values.pop('display_name', None)
   311→                values.pop('__last_update', None)
   312→                
   313→                values['project_id'] = project.id
   314→                values['division_bom_id'] = project.x_selected_division_id.id
   315→
   316→                if line.id and line.id in existing_lines.ids:
   317→                    LOG.info(
   318→                        "Project %s: Updating existing line %s with values: %s",
   319→                        project.id,
   320→                        line.id,
   321→                        values,
   322→                    )
   323→                    new_records.append((1, line.id, values))
   324→                    updated_count += 1
   325→                else:
   326→                    LOG.info(
   327→                        "Project %s: Creating new line with values: %s",
   328→                        project.id,
   329→                        values,
   330→                    )
   331→                    new_records.append((0, 0, values)) 
   332→                    created_count += 1
   333→
   334→            filtered_ids = {line.id for line in project.x_filtered_item_bom_ids if line.id}
   335→            lines_to_delete = existing_lines.filtered(lambda l: l.id not in filtered_ids)
   336→            
   337→            for line in lines_to_delete:
   338→                LOG.info("Project %s: Deleting line %s", project.id, line.id)
   339→                new_records.append((2, line.id, 0))
   340→                deleted_count += 1
   341→            
   342→            LOG.info("Project %s: Final commands: %s", project.id, new_records)
   343→            project.item_bom_ids = new_records
   344→            LOG.summary(
   345→                "Project BOM inverse completed for project %s division %s: updated=%s created=%s deleted=%s kept=%s",
   346→                project.id,
   347→                project.x_selected_division_id.id,
   348→                updated_count,
   349→                created_count,
   350→                deleted_count,
   351→                len(other_lines),
   352→                surface_to_main=False,
   353→            )
   354→
   355→
   356→    @api.constrains('x_selected_division_id', 'x_filtered_item_bom_ids')
   357→    def _check_division_required(self):
   358→        for project in self:
   359→            if project.x_filtered_item_bom_ids and not project.x_selected_division_id:
   360→                raise ValidationError(
   361→                    "You must select a 'Division for BOM View' when there are Item BOM Lines."
   362→                )

   453→    def get_bom_summary_data(self):
   454→        self.ensure_one()
   455→        LOG.info(
   456→            "Starting BOM summary data retrieval for project_id=%s name=%s",
   457→            self.id,
   458→            self.name,
   459→        )
   460→        data = []
   461→        if not self.x_division_bom_ids:
   462→            LOG.warning(
   463→                "Project %s has no divisions (x_division_bom_ids). Returning empty data.",
   464→                self.id,
   465→            )
   466→            return []
   467→
   468→        for division in self.x_division_bom_ids:
   469→            LOG.info(
   470→                "Processing division_id=%s installation=%s",
   471→                division.id,
   472→                division.installation_id.display_name if division.installation_id else "",
   473→            )
   474→            if not division.id or isinstance(division.id, models.NewId):
   475→                LOG.warning(
   476→                    "Skipping unsaved division (NewId). Division will be processed after save."
   477→                )
   478→                continue
   479→
   480→            items = self.item_bom_ids.filtered(
   481→                lambda line: line.division_bom_id.id == division.id
   482→            )
   483→            labor_titles = division.labor_title_ids
   484→
   485→            labor_type = self.env["project.labor.type.bom.line"].search(
   486→                [
   487→                    ("project_id", "=", self.id),
   488→                    ("division_bom_id", "=", division.id),
   489→                ],
   490→                limit=1,
   491→            )
   492→            if labor_type:
   493→                LOG.info(
   494→                    "Division %s labor type id=%s total_techs_qty=%f total_man_hours_bom=%f",
   495→                    division.id,
   496→                    labor_type.id,
   497→                    labor_type.total_techs_qty,
   498→                    labor_type.total_man_hours_bom,
   499→                )
   500→            else:
   501→                LOG.info(
   502→                    "Division %s: no labor type line (report will show empty crew section).",
   503→                    division.id,
   504→                )
   505→
   506→            labor_bom = self.env["project.labor.bom.line"].search(
   507→                [
   508→                    ("project_id", "=", self.id),
   509→                    ("division_bom_id", "=", division.id),
   510→                ],
   511→                limit=1,
   512→            )
   513→            if labor_bom:
   514→                LOG.info(
   515→                    "Division %s labor BOM id=%s total_price=%f",
   516→                    division.id,
   517→                    labor_bom.id,
   518→                    labor_bom.total_labor_price_sum,
   519→                )
   520→            else:
   521→                LOG.info(
   522→                    "Division %s: no labor BOM line (report will show warning).",
   523→                    division.id,
   524→                )
   525→
   526→            travel = self.env["project.travel.expense.line"].search(
   527→                [
   528→                    ("project_id", "=", self.id),
   529→                    ("division_bom_id", "=", division.id),
   530→                ],
   531→                limit=1,
   532→            )
   533→            if travel:
   534→                LOG.info(
   535→                    "Division %s travel expense id=%s total_cost=%f",
   536→                    division.id,
   537→                    travel.id,
   538→                    travel.total_travel_expense_cost,
   539→                )
   540→            else:
   541→                LOG.info(
   542→                    "Division %s: no travel expense line (report will show warning).",
   543→                    division.id,
   544→                )
   545→
   546→            data.append(
   547→                {
   548→                    "division": division,
   549→                    "items": items,
   550→                    "labor_titles": labor_titles,
   551→                    "labor_bom": labor_bom or False,
   552→                    "labor_type": labor_type or False,
   553→                    "travel": travel or False,
   554→                }
   555→            )
   556→
   557→        LOG.summary(
   558→            "BOM summary data packaged for project_id=%s divisions=%s",
   559→            self.id,
   560→            len(data),
   561→            surface_to_main=False,
   562→        )
   563→        return data

   565→    def get_bom_summary_totals(self):
   566→        self.ensure_one()
   567→        data = self.get_bom_summary_data()
   568→        total_labor = 0.0
   569→        total_travel = 0.0
   570→        total_items = 0.0
   571→
   572→        for division_data in data:
   573→            if division_data.get("labor_bom"):
   574→                total_labor += division_data["labor_bom"].total_labor_price_sum
   575→            if division_data.get("travel"):
   576→                total_travel += division_data["travel"].total_travel_expense_cost
   577→            if division_data.get("items"):
   578→                total_items += sum(
   579→                    division_data["items"].mapped("final_estimated_price")
   580→                )
   581→
   582→        modified_items = total_items + self.x_bom_summary_items_adjustment
   583→        modified_labor = total_labor + self.x_bom_summary_labor_adjustment
   584→        modified_travel = total_travel + self.x_bom_summary_travel_adjustment
   585→        modified_subcontractor = 0.0 + self.x_bom_summary_subcontractor_adjustment
   586→        modified_equipment = 0.0 + self.x_bom_summary_equipment_adjustment
   587→        modified_freight = 0.0 + self.x_bom_summary_freight_adjustment
   588→        modified_bond = 0.0 + self.x_bom_summary_bond_adjustment
   589→        modified_miscellaneous = 0.0 + self.x_bom_summary_miscellaneous_adjustment
   590→        modified_reserve = 0.0 + self.x_bom_summary_reserve_adjustment
   591→
   592→        grand_total = total_labor + total_travel + total_items
   593→        modified_grand_total = (
   594→            modified_items + modified_labor + modified_travel + modified_subcontractor + modified_equipment + modified_freight + modified_bond + modified_miscellaneous + modified_reserve
   595→        )
   596→
   597→        LOG.summary(
   598→            "BOM totals computed for project_id=%s labor=%f travel=%f items=%f grand_total=%f modified_total=%f",
   599→            self.id,
   600→            total_labor,
   601→            total_travel,
   602→            total_items,
   603→            grand_total,
   604→            modified_grand_total,
   605→            surface_to_main=False,
   606→        )
   607→
   608→        items_current = self.x_bom_summary_items_current_expense
   609→        labor_current = self.x_bom_summary_labor_current_expense
   610→        equipment_current = self.x_bom_summary_equipment_current_expense
   611→        travel_current = self.x_bom_summary_travel_current_expense
   612→        subcontractor_current = self.x_bom_summary_subcontractor_current_expense
   613→        freight_current = self.x_bom_summary_freight_current_expense
   614→        bond_current = self.x_bom_summary_bond_current_expense
   615→        miscellaneous_current = self.x_bom_summary_miscellaneous_current_expense
   616→        reserve_current = self.x_bom_summary_reserve_current_expense
   617→
   618→        items_balance = self.x_bom_summary_items_adjustment - items_current
   619→        labor_balance = self.x_bom_summary_labor_adjustment - labor_current
   620→        equipment_balance = self.x_bom_summary_equipment_adjustment - equipment_current
   621→        travel_balance = self.x_bom_summary_travel_adjustment - travel_current
   622→        subcontractor_balance = (
   623→            self.x_bom_summary_subcontractor_adjustment - subcontractor_current
   624→        )
   625→        freight_balance = self.x_bom_summary_freight_adjustment - freight_current
   626→        bond_balance = self.x_bom_summary_bond_adjustment - bond_current
   627→        miscellaneous_balance = (
   628→            self.x_bom_summary_miscellaneous_adjustment - miscellaneous_current
   629→        )
   630→        reserve_balance = self.x_bom_summary_reserve_adjustment - reserve_current
   631→        balance_grand_total = (
   632→            items_balance
   633→            + labor_balance
   634→            + equipment_balance
   635→            + travel_balance
   636→            + subcontractor_balance
   637→            + freight_balance
   638→            + bond_balance
   639→            + miscellaneous_balance
   640→            + reserve_balance
   641→        )
   642→        total_estimated_budget_adjustment = (
   643→            self.x_bom_summary_items_adjustment
   644→            + self.x_bom_summary_labor_adjustment
   645→            + self.x_bom_summary_equipment_adjustment
   646→            + self.x_bom_summary_travel_adjustment
   647→            + self.x_bom_summary_subcontractor_adjustment
   648→            + self.x_bom_summary_freight_adjustment
   649→            + self.x_bom_summary_bond_adjustment
   650→            + self.x_bom_summary_miscellaneous_adjustment
   651→            + self.x_bom_summary_reserve_adjustment
   652→        )
   653→        total_current_expense_sum = (
   654→            items_current
   655→            + labor_current
   656→            + equipment_current
   657→            + travel_current
   658→            + subcontractor_current
   659→            + freight_current
   660→            + bond_current
   661→            + miscellaneous_current
   662→            + reserve_current
   663→        )
   664→
   665→        return {
   666→            "total_labor": total_labor,
   667→            "total_travel": total_travel,
   668→            "total_items": total_items,
   669→            "total_subcontractor": 0.0,
   670→            "grand_total": grand_total,
   671→            "items_adjustment": self.x_bom_summary_items_adjustment,
   672→            "labor_adjustment": self.x_bom_summary_labor_adjustment,
   673→            "equipment_adjustment": self.x_bom_summary_equipment_adjustment,
   674→            "travel_adjustment": self.x_bom_summary_travel_adjustment,
   675→            "subcontractor_adjustment": self.x_bom_summary_subcontractor_adjustment,
   676→            "freight_adjustment": self.x_bom_summary_freight_adjustment,
   677→            "bond_adjustment": self.x_bom_summary_bond_adjustment,
   678→            "miscellaneous_adjustment": self.x_bom_summary_miscellaneous_adjustment,
   679→            "reserve_adjustment": self.x_bom_summary_reserve_adjustment,
   680→            "items_current_expense": items_current,
   681→            "labor_current_expense": labor_current,
   682→            "equipment_current_expense": equipment_current,
   683→            "travel_current_expense": travel_current,
   684→            "subcontractor_current_expense": subcontractor_current,
   685→            "freight_current_expense": freight_current,
   686→            "bond_current_expense": bond_current,
   687→            "miscellaneous_current_expense": miscellaneous_current,
   688→            "reserve_current_expense": reserve_current,

   703→            "modified_travel": modified_travel,

   705→            "modified_equipment": modified_equipment,
   706→            "modified_freight": modified_freight,
   707→            "modified_bond": modified_bond,

   709→            "modified_reserve": modified_reserve,
   710→            "modified_grand_total": modified_grand_total,

   712→
   713→    def _bom_balance_expense_snapshot(self):
   714→        self.ensure_one()
   715→        return {f: self[f] for f in BOM_BALANCE_EXPENSE_FIELD_NAMES}
   716→
   717→    def write(self, vals):
   718→        expense_in_vals = [k for k in BOM_BALANCE_EXPENSE_FIELD_NAMES if k in vals]
   719→        old_snapshots = {}
   720→        if expense_in_vals and not self.env.context.get("bom_balance_skip_audit"):
   721→            old_snapshots = {p.id: p._bom_balance_expense_snapshot() for p in self}
   722→        res = super().write(vals)
   723→        if expense_in_vals and not self.env.context.get("bom_balance_skip_audit"):
   724→            Audit = self.env["project.bom.balance.audit"].sudo()
   725→            for p in self:
   726→                old = old_snapshots[p.id]
   727→                new = p._bom_balance_expense_snapshot()
   728→                changed_keys = [
   729→                    BOM_BALANCE_KEY_BY_FIELD[f]
   730→                    for f in BOM_BALANCE_EXPENSE_FIELD_NAMES
   731→                    if amounts_differ(old[f], new[f])
   732→                ]
   733→                if not changed_keys:
   734→                    continue
   735→                create_vals = {
   736→                    "project_id": p.id,
   737→                    "changed_field_keys": changed_keys,
   738→                }
   739→                for proj_f in BOM_BALANCE_EXPENSE_FIELD_NAMES:
   740→                    create_vals[PROJECT_TO_AUDIT[proj_f]] = new[proj_f]
   741→                Audit.with_context(bom_balance_audit_from_project_write=True).create(
   742→                    create_vals
   743→                )
   744→        return res

# project_division_bom.py
from odoo import api, fields, models

from odoo.addons.common_logging.logging_bootstrap import get_addon_loggers

from .bom_balance_audit import (
    BOM_BALANCE_EXPENSE_FIELD_NAMES,
    BOM_BALANCE_KEY_BY_FIELD,
    PROJECT_TO_AUDIT,
    amounts_differ,
)

LOG = get_addon_loggers("project_bom")

class ProjectInstallation(models.Model):
    _name = 'project.installation'
    _description = 'Project Installation Definition'
    
    name = fields.Char(string='Installation Name', required=True)
    installation_number = fields.Char(string='Installation Number', required=True, copy=False)
    
    _sql_constraints = [
        ('installation_number_unique', 
         'unique(installation_number)', 
         'The installation number must be unique!')
    ]


class ProjectDivisionBOMItem(models.Model):
    _name = 'project.division.bom.item'
    _description = 'Project Division BOM Line Item'
    
    installation_id = fields.Many2one(
        'x.installation',   
        string='Division',
        required=True
    )
    _rec_name = 'installation_id'

    installation_number = fields.Char(
        string='Division Number',

                - project.x_bom_summary_travel_current_expense

            project.x_bom_summary_subcontractor_balance = (
                project.x_bom_summary_subcontractor_adjustment
                - project.x_bom_summary_subcontractor_current_expense
            )
            project.x_bom_summary_freight_balance = (
                project.x_bom_summary_freight_adjustment
                - project.x_bom_summary_freight_current_expense
            )
            project.x_bom_summary_bond_balance = (

                + project.x_bom_summary_reserve_balance

            project.x_bom_summary_total_current_expense = (

    @api.depends(

    def _compute_bom_totals_for_display(self):
        for project in self:
            totals = project.get_bom_summary_totals()
            total_adjustment = (
                totals["items_adjustment"]
                + totals["labor_adjustment"]
                + totals["travel_adjustment"]

            project.x_bom_summary_total_items = totals["total_items"]

            project.x_bom_summary_total_travel = totals["total_travel"]
